title: loxogramme scolopendrioides
intro: Loxogramme scolopendrioides, also known as the walking fern, is a type of rare and endangered epiphytic plant species belonging to the Loxogramme genus. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Loxogramme scolopendrioides is often used in decoctions or infusions, and its rhizome is dried and crushed to make a powder for medicinal use.
